---
title: "lecture6b"
author: "Emma Rasmussen"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Flow Control

Classic example is IF then ELSE

ifelse(condition, TRUE, FALSE)

best used for simple application

if..else structure

```{r}
a = 20
classr  = ifelse(a > 90, "high","low")
classr

# also works with multiple values
a = runif(min=1, max=100, n=5)
a

# ifelse can work with vectors
classr  = ifelse(a > 90, "high","low")
classr

```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
